title: Boat Rental in Lipno Reservoir: How to Choose Your Vessel
html:
When renting a boat on Lipno Reservoir, often called the 'Czech Sea', you can launch from Lipno nad Vltavou and expect to pay from €40 for a two-hour tours to €350 for a full-day catamaran. BoatHire24 connects you with local owners so you can easily compare verified boat listings and pick the right craft for your party.

Where to set off in Lipno Reservoir

Lipno Reservoir stretches 48 km along the Vltava River. Main departure points include Lipno nad Vltavou Marina, Frymburk, Černá v Pošumaví, and the quieter bays near Hůrka. Each offers parking, fuel, and boat hire kiosks in season. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

For a longer cruise, motor to the village of Přední Výtoň or anchor in the sheltered cove at Dolní Vltavice. Wind conditions are usually light, but south-westerlies can gust across the open water.

Which boat to rent in Lipno Reservoir

  1. Small motorboat, ideal for exploring the many coves and fishing spots; seats up to 5 people; from €50 for 2 hours.
  2. Bowrider (e.g. Olympic 490), perfect for watersports and families; seats 4, 6; you can check this speedboat on BoatHire24 to see rates and availability.
  3. Sport cruiser (e.g. Axopar 24), a comfortable day cruiser for 6, 8 guests; from €180 half-day.
  4. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 38), stable and spacious for up to 10 passengers; full-day hire from €350.
  5. Houseboat, the slow-paced option for a multi-day trip; sleeps 4, 6; prices from €200 per night.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Lipno Reservoir?

Prices range from €40 for a shared sightseeing tour to over €500 for a crewed yacht for the day. Exact figures depend on season, boat size, and duration. Use the platform to compare verified boat listings and find current deals.

  • Shared two-hour tour: from €40 per person.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): €80, €130.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): €300, €450.
  • Crewed yacht (e.g. Sunseeker 35) full-day: €450, €600.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Lipno Reservoir?

For boats up to 7.5 m with an engine of up to 15 kW (20 hp), no licence is required; larger vessels require a VHF or inland waterways licence. Operators on BoatHire24 confirm exact requirements when you book, so always check the listing details before your trip.

Tip: book your boat for the high-season months of July and August well in advance, as the popular Frymburk stretch sees strong demand and limited availability.

When is the best season to rent a boat in Lipno Reservoir?

The main season runs from May to September, with peak demand in July and August when water temperatures reach 22°C. The dominant wind is the 'Lipno breeze' from the west, which can build in the afternoon, so plan early-morning outings for calm conditions. Spring (May, June) and early autumn (September) offer quieter waters and lower prices.

At a glance

  • Price band: €40 (shared tour) to €600 (crewed yacht)
  • Peak months: July, August
  • Typical trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Capacity: 4 to 12 people depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Lipno Reservoir

Can I rent a boat in Lipno Reservoir without a licence?

Yes, for small motorboats under 7.5 m and under 15 kW power, no licence is needed; always confirm with the owner.

What is the best boat for a family with children?

A bowrider or small catamaran offers stable decks and sunbathing areas, ideal for families with kids under 12.

Is it possible to rent a boat for a week on Lipno?

Yes, houseboats and larger cruisers are available for multi-day rentals, often based from Lipno nad Vltavou Marina.

How far can I travel from Lipno nad Vltavou in 4 hours?

With a typical motorboat at 15 knots, you can reach Černá v Pošumaví and back, covering about 12 nautical miles each way.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Lipno Reservoir or list your own. If you own a vessel at the reservoir, consider joining the platform to list a boat for free and reach thousands of travellers planning their 2026 holiday.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Lipno Reservoir and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
